title: paspalum polyphyllum
intro: Paspalum polyphyllum, also known as many-flowered paspalum, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Paspalum polyphyllum include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Paspalum polyphyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine.
